summary: Senior Backend Engineer with 6+ years building high-throughput backend systems, production GenAI features, and e-commerce platforms. Shipped systems processing 100k events/second, 50k+ orders/day, and 100k+ requests/day with sub-1s P95 latency.
skills: Backend: Node.js, TypeScript, Python, Flask, Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs | Data: SQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, ETL, Snowplow, Event Systems | AI/LLM: GenAI, LLMs, LangChain, LangGraph, RAG, OpenRouter | Infra/Observability: Docker, Git, AWS, New Relic, LangSmith, Langfuse

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer (Backend / AI Systems)
bullets: Architected and authored system design for Snowplow-based event ingestion pipelines processing 100k events/second (Node.js, TypeScript), aligning 3 cross-functional teams.
Built GenAI-powered ad creative generation APIs (Flask, OpenRouter), automating personalized ad content generation for large product catalogs with model-routing support.
Established GenAI observability standards and integrated tracing (LangSmith, Langfuse) across request flows, reducing debugging time for prompt and model failures by 35%.

experience.title: Software Engineer (Backend)
bullets: Led a team of 3 developers to architect an in-house order management system processing 50k orders/day (Java, Spring Boot, MongoDB).
Built and maintained integrations across Shopify, Amazon, WooCommerce, and other e-commerce providers, handling 100k+ requests/day.

projects.name: Hindsight
bullets: Built a multi-agent market analysis platform (LangGraph, FastAPI, Next.js) with an AI Trader agent and specialist analysts for point-in-time stock analysis.
Streamed agent pipeline runs over SSE with Langfuse tracing and Supabase-backed replay for debugging completed analyses.
